H2: Custom Refrigerator Magnet FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Refrigerator Magnets

Premium Quality Magnets for Business Promotion & Personal Use

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Select Size & Quantity Choose Production Speed Upload Your Design Add Special Instructions Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Create professional custom refrigerator magnets for business promotion, restaurant takeout menus, or personal use. Our high-quality magnetic material ensures your message stays visible on any magnetic surface. Perfect for advertising your business phone number, showcasing your brand, or creating memorable promotional items. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Each refrigerator magnet features durable laminated finish protection and your choice of cut options including die cut, square cut with rounded corners, or standard square cut. Upload your artwork through our online designer or submit print-ready files for professional results.

Ideal for businesses, restaurants, real estate agents, service providers, and anyone looking to create lasting brand visibility on refrigerators and magnetic surfaces.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design Your Custom Refrigerator Magnets Online

Design Process

Create your custom refrigerator magnets using our easy online designer or upload your own print-ready files. Choose from our extensive clipart library or upload your business logo and images directly from your computer. For optimal quality results, we recommend uploading vector-based EPS files when possible.

Once you've completed your design and added the product to your cart, select your preferred shipping method to proceed. A digital proof will be automatically emailed to you for review and approval before production begins.

Payment

All refrigerator magnet orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards for immediate processing. Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before your magnets enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your custom refrigerator magnet order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your order through every stage of our streamlined process, from initial design review to final delivery. Click the tracking link in your confirmation email to access real-time updates on your order status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Refrigerator Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule offers multiple turnaround options ranging from one to five business days, allowing you to choose the timeline that best fits your needs. Production time begins once your artwork is approved and payment is processed.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Perfect for tight deadlines requiring immediate turnaround. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin processing the following business day. Emergency same-day service may be available in select cases - contact our customer service team to discuss your specific requirements.

2 Business Days Express Production

Ideal when you need your refrigerator magnets quickly but have slightly more flexibility in timing. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST start production the next business day. Emergency rush options may be available upon request.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option, offering the perfect balance of speed and value. This timeline works well for most custom magnet projects while maintaining our quality standards. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective option for projects without immediate deadlines. Choose this timeline to save money while still receiving the same high-quality refrigerator magnets. Production begins the business day following approval for orders approved after 5:00 PM CST.

Important Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time. Production timing starts when file upload is complete and approved. If your order requires prepress review or proof approval, timing begins from approval confirmation.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Cut Options for Refrigerator Magnets

All refrigerator magnets include a protective laminate finish for durability and professional appearance. Choose from three cutting options to match your design requirements and aesthetic preferences.

Die Cut Refrigerator Magnets

Custom shaped magnets cut precisely to match your artwork's unique contours and design elements. Perfect for logos, mascots, or distinctive shapes that require exact outline cutting. Die cutting creates professional-looking magnets that stand out on any magnetic surface.

Square Cut with Rounded Corners

Our standard finishing option featuring clean square edges with gently rounded corners for a polished, professional appearance. This cut style prevents sharp corners while maintaining a traditional rectangular magnet shape that works well for most business and promotional applications.

Square Cut Refrigerator Magnets

Clean, precise rectangular cutting with sharp 90-degree corners for a crisp, modern look. Ideal for designs that require exact geometric edges or when you prefer traditional square magnet formatting for business cards, contact information, or promotional messaging.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Refrigerator Magnets

Preferred File Types

For optimal printing quality on your refrigerator magnets, submit files in Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) or PDF (Adobe PDF) format. These vector-based formats ensure crisp, professional results at any size. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution during printing.

Maximum accepted file size is 100 MB for all refrigerator magnet orders.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files for refrigerator magnet printing. When submitting raster images, ensure adequate resolution for your final magnet size to prevent pixelation or quality loss.

File Setup Tips

Set up your artwork proportionate to the exact refrigerator magnet size you're ordering. Convert all text elements to outlines to ensure accurate font reproduction. Allow for bleed only when necessary for your specific design. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files, and clearly indicate cut lines for all magnet products.

Vector vs Raster Guidelines

Vector art consists of mathematically defined lines and curves that maintain quality at any size, making it ideal for logos and text on refrigerator magnets. Raster images use pixels and have resolution limitations - submit raster files at 100% scale with 100 DPI minimum, or proportionally higher resolution for smaller scale submissions.

If you need assistance with artwork preparation, our design services can recreate or vectorize your images starting at $15, with complex designs quoted individually.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Your Custom Refrigerator Magnets

Your refrigerator magnet order will be carefully packaged and shipped to arrive in perfect condition. Shipping time is separate from production time - your total delivery timeline includes both production and transit time.

Shipping Methods

We offer multiple shipping options to meet your timeline and budget requirements. Standard ground shipping provides cost-effective delivery for most refrigerator magnet orders. Expedited shipping options are available when you need faster delivery to meet tight deadlines.

All refrigerator magnets are securely packaged to prevent damage during transit and arrive ready to use immediately upon delivery.

Shipping Time Expectations

Expect your refrigerator magnet order to arrive within 2-7 business days depending on your location and selected shipping method. Ground shipping typically takes 3-5 business days to most locations, while expedited options can reduce transit time to 1-2 business days.

Important Shipping Notes

Shipping time begins after your refrigerator magnets complete production and leave our facility. Track your shipment using the tracking number provided in your shipping confirmation email. For time-sensitive orders, consider both production time and shipping time when planning your delivery needs.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installing & Using Your Refrigerator Magnets

Your custom refrigerator magnets arrive ready to use immediately. The magnetic backing provides strong adhesion to any ferromagnetic surface including refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards, and metal doors.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the target surface with a damp cloth to remove dust, grease, or residue that might interfere with magnetic contact. Ensure the surface is completely dry before applying your refrigerator magnet for optimal magnetic strength and longevity.

Applying Your Refrigerator Magnets

Simply position your magnet on the desired location and press gently. The magnetic backing will immediately adhere to the metal surface. No additional adhesives or tools are required for installation.

Refrigerator magnets can be easily repositioned or removed without leaving residue, making them perfect for frequently updated information like menus, contact details, or promotional messages.

Maximizing Magnet Performance

For best results, place refrigerator magnets on flat, smooth metal surfaces. Avoid textured or painted surfaces that may reduce magnetic contact. Store unused magnets flat and avoid stacking multiple magnets together to prevent damage to printed surfaces.

The laminated finish protects your refrigerator magnets from moisture, fading, and everyday wear, ensuring your message remains visible and professional-looking for extended periods.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Refrigerator Magnets?

Refrigerator magnets are custom printed promotional items featuring a flexible magnetic backing that adheres to metal surfaces. Made from durable vinyl material with a strong magnetic base, these versatile marketing tools are commonly used by businesses for contact information, takeout menus, appointment reminders, and brand promotion. The magnetic backing allows for easy placement and removal from refrigerators, filing cabinets, and other metal surfaces without adhesive residue.

Order Custom Refrigerator Magnets for Your Business Today

Create professional refrigerator magnets that keep your business visible in customers' homes and offices. Our high-quality printing and durable magnetic material ensure your promotional message stays prominent on any magnetic surface. Perfect for restaurants, service businesses, real estate agents, and retailers looking to maintain ongoing customer engagement.

Choose from multiple sizes, production speeds, and cut options to create refrigerator magnets that perfectly match your marketing goals. Upload your design today or work with our team to create custom artwork that represents your brand professionally.

Ready to get started? Use our online design tool to create your custom car magnet or explore our custom photo magnet options for personal projects. For special occasions, check out our save the date magnets to create memorable wedding announcements.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Refrigerator Magnet FAQs

What materials are refrigerator magnets made from?

Our refrigerator magnets are made from durable vinyl material with a flexible magnetic backing and protective laminate coating. The magnetic base provides strong adhesion to metal surfaces while the laminated finish protects against moisture, fading, and everyday wear for long-lasting promotional visibility.

What surfaces do refrigerator magnets stick to?

Refrigerator magnets adhere to any ferromagnetic metal surface including refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards, metal doors, and appliances. They work best on smooth, flat metal surfaces and will not stick to aluminum, brass, copper, or non-metal surfaces.

How long do custom refrigerator magnets last?

With proper care, refrigerator magnets typically last 2-5 years depending on environmental conditions and usage. The laminated finish protects against fading and moisture damage, while the magnetic backing maintains its strength over extended periods when stored and used properly.

What file formats work best for refrigerator magnet artwork?

Vector files in EPS or PDF format produce the highest quality results for refrigerator magnet printing. These formats maintain crisp edges and text at any size. High-resolution JPG, PNG, and TIFF files are also acceptable when provided at adequate resolution for your final magnet size.

Can refrigerator magnets be cut to custom shapes?

Yes, we offer die cutting services to create refrigerator magnets in custom shapes that match your artwork or logo outline. You can also choose standard square cut or square cut with rounded corners depending on your design preferences and intended use.

What are the most common uses for custom refrigerator magnets?

Businesses commonly use refrigerator magnets for contact information, restaurant takeout menus, service reminders, real estate marketing, and brand promotion. They're also popular for personal use including photo magnets, save-the-date announcements, and promotional giveaways at trade shows and events.
